Video.summary: On vacation, Rebecca’s daughter sneaks out and sparks a shocking mystery.

Video.title: Treat at Mountain Top

Video.title: Twin Body Swap

Video.title: Ninjas Take Over Wrestlemania

Video.title: Mario Mayhem

Video.title: Guess The Mom

Video.title: Twin Job Tryout

Video.summary: Rebecca and Zadie celebrate 24 holidays in one jam-packed 24-hour day.

Video.summary: Jazzy is surprised with a special first dance, including her friend flown in and fun dance challenges.
Video.title: Jazzy’s Homecoming Surprise
